title: Knarfy's Barns & Nobles Update
description:
Created by Knarfy for the video "I Coded your Terrible Update Ideas into Minecraft" and based on the comment from @Animator2000.
Adds Barns and Nobles into the game along with a few other fun features!
body:
# Knarfy's Barns and Nobles Update
(Official Mod Release)

**This project was created and released specifically for Knarfy's YouTube video. Do not expect consistent updates or new versions.**

### **Take a look at the video here:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Qzqprjzyve0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **This is the winner of the vote!**
The Barns and Nobles update includes new features like Barns with new variants of pigs and cows, as well as the Noble's Mansion with a new Noble boss and Iron Golem Wand.

You can find the Barn and Noble's Mansion structures spawning throughout the overworld. Take a look inside to see what new features are around!

More information on features can be found in the Gallery, or via the original YouTube Video!

Game breaking bugs can be sent to Knarfy through his Discord server: https://discord.knarfy.com/
